title: polygala oligosperma
intro: Polygala oligosperma, also known as Desert Indigo or California Milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygala oligosperma include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Polygala oligosperma is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or extract, and can also be dried to be used in herbal supplements.
